sentence: 角色简介攻略简介 ′鲈奈.一谕女尤诺 , 在七丘拥有着一言一决的权利。灵活穿梭于战场 , 既可以轻松躲避敌人的攻击 , 又能抓住时机迅速发起反击 , 让敌人难以捉描。搭配 “ 月轮 “ 武器 , 不仅攻击伤害高 , 还能借助月光的力量获得额外战斗增益 , 为团队带来生存治疗与 BUFF 增益 , 高链输出非常可观。使她在战斗中更加游刃有余 , 在团队中发挥莲重要作用。
translation: Character introduction, strategy introduction, Yuno, the girl with a word and decision in Qiqiu, can flexibly shuttle around the battlefield. She can easily avoid enemy attacks and seize the opportunity to quickly launch counterattacks, making the enemy elusive. With the moon wheel weapon, it not only has high attack damage, but also uses the power of the moonlight to obtain additional combat buffs, bringing survival treatment and gain to the team. The high chain output is very impressive, making her more comfortable in battle, and plays an important role in the team. . . .

sentence: るだー縄啓る道

キャラ紹介簡略攻略髑 . ユーノは共鳴解放ダメージを主軸とするアタッカーでありながら回復やサポート能力も兼ね備えた全体的に非常に強力なキャラクターです . 変奏スキルと必殺技を発動することで自身にの全ダメージバフを付与でき共鳴スキル終末の響きまたは必殺技で月相の巡り状慈に入り本格的な攻撃を開始します . 戦園スタイルは霊性を溜めそれを消費しながら火力を出すのが基本協奏エネルギーが最大になると強化重撃を放ちチーム内全員の HP を回復しつつ特殊なフィールド満月領域を展開できます . 終奏スキルは次のに登場するキャラクターの重撃ダメージを大幅にアップさせる効果がぁりま囁
translation: Character introduction brief walkthrough Yuno the Skull is an attacker who focuses on resonance release damage, but he also has recovery and support abilities, making him a very powerful character overall. By activating variation skills and special moves, he can buff all damage to himself. With the resonance skill End of the Sound or special move, he enters the cycle of the moon phase and enters into full-fledged form. The Senen style is based on accumulating spirituality and consuming it while issuing firepower. When the concerted energy reaches its maximum, it releases a strengthening heavy attack that recovers the health of everyone on the team and can deploy a special field full moon area. The final skill has the effect of greatly increasing the heavy attack damage of the characters that appear next.
